text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BBC : Pakistan is preparing to host US‑Iran peace talks in Islamabad after successfully brokering a two‑week ceasefire. The country has declared a two‑day holiday and has deployed around 10,000 security forces. Pakistan’s military chief, Field Marshal Asim Munir – described by U.S. President Trump as his “favourite field marshal” – led the reconciliation effort, having previously handed over the alleged mastermind of the 2021 Kabul airport bombing to the U.S. Pakistan has also signed a $500 million critical minerals deal and a cryptocurrency agreement linked to the Trump family. Pakistan has played its part, but a former ambassador noted: “You can take the horse to water, you can’t make it drink.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BBC：巴基斯坦在成功斡旋两周停火后，正准备在伊斯兰堡主办美伊和平谈判。该国已宣布放假两天，并部署了约1万名安全部队。巴基斯坦军事首长、被美国总统特朗普称为“他最喜欢的陆军元帅”的阿西姆·穆尼尔（Asim Munir）领导了此次和解努力，他此前曾将2021年喀布尔机场爆炸案的所谓主谋移交给美国。巴基斯坦还签署了一项价值5亿美元的关键矿产协议以及一项与特朗普家族有关的加密货币协议。巴基斯坦已经尽了自己的一份力量，但一位前大使指出：“你可以把马牵到水边，但你不能强迫它喝水。” @wfwitness

text: 🇨🇳 🇰🇵 Chinese FM Wang Yi met with Kim Jong Un, General Secretary of the Workers’ Party of Korea and President of the State Affairs of the Democratic People’s Republic of Korea, in Pyongyang. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

Advocates estimate that there are at least six U.S. citizens in Iranian custody, likely taken to be used as bargaining chips with the U.S. @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇻🇦 Pope Leo XIV says “absurd and inhuman violence is spreading ferociously” through the sacred places of the Christian East. He warns that lives are being treated as “collateral damage of self-interest,” with no regard for civilians, including children and families. He states that “no cause can justify the shedding of innocent blood.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇻🇦 教皇利奥十四世表示，“荒谬且不人道的暴力正在基督教东方圣地疯狂蔓延”。他警告说，生命正被视为“自身利益的附带损害”，完全不顾平民，包括儿童和家庭。他指出，“没有任何理由可以为流无辜者的血辩护”。@wfwitness

text: Netanyahu asked to postpone his court testimony for two weeks, citing "classified security and political reasons." Source: N12
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡以“机密安全和政治原因”为由，要求将其法庭证词推迟两周。来源：N12

text: Netanyahu asked Jerusalem Court to postpone his corruption trial testimony for at least two weeks, citing classified security and diplomatic reasons linked to current “dramatic events.” Netanyahu has been on trial since 2020 on fraud, breach of trust, and bribery charges.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡要求耶路撒冷法院将其腐败审判的证词推迟至少两周，理由是与当前“戏剧性事件”有关的机密安全和外交原因。内塔尼亚胡自2020年以来一直因欺诈、背信和受贿指控受审。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Two new Israeli airstrikes have targeted the outskirts of the city of Bint Jbeil and the town of Shaqra in southern Lebanon @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 两起新的以色列空袭袭击了黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒市郊区和沙克拉镇 @wfwitness

text: Benny Johnson: Netanyahu should be banned from the White House.
text_zh: 本尼·约翰逊：内塔尼亚胡应该被禁止进入白宫。

text: Former U.S. Secretary of State John Kerry: Netanyahu wanted us to strike Iran. He came to President Obama. He made a presentation to ask to strike. President Obama refused. President Biden refused. President Bush refused. The only president who has agreed to this, obviously, is President Trump.
text_zh: 美国前国务卿约翰·克里：内塔尼亚胡曾想让我们打击伊朗。他来到奥巴马总统面前。他做了陈述要求打击。奥巴马总统拒绝了。拜登总统拒绝了。布什总统拒绝了。显然，唯一同意这一点的总统是特朗普总统。

text: Pope Leo XIV: Absurd and inhuman violence is spreading ferociously through the sacred places of the Christian East, profaned by the blasphemy of war and the brutality of business, with no regard for people’s lives, which are considered at most collateral damage of self-interest. But no gain can be worth the life of the weakest, children, or families. No cause can justify the shedding of innocent blood.
text_zh: 教皇利奥十四世：荒谬且不人道地暴力正在基督教东方圣地疯狂蔓延，被战争的亵渎和商业的残酷所玷污，完全不顾人们的生命，这些生命充其量被视为自身利益的附带损害。但没有任何收益值得以最弱者、儿童或家庭的生命为代价。没有任何理由可以为流无辜者的血辩护。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 MTV Lebanon: Beirut is witnessing a significant deployment of the Lebanese Army following yesterday’s government decision. Commando regiment patrols have been seen, and several army snipers have been deployed on high-rise buildings around the Grand Serail area @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩MTV：继昨天政府做出决定后，贝鲁特正在见证黎巴嫩军队的大规模部署。已看到突击队巡逻，并在大塞拉伊（Grand Serail）地区周围的高层建筑上部署了几名军队狙击手 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Mannie's War Room: "More than 24 hours have passed since the IDF issued a new evacuation warning for Beirut’s southern suburbs, yet no strikes have been carried out.US President Donald Trump reportedly asked Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to scale back Israeli strikes on Lebanon to prevent the collapse of the fragile ceasefire with Iran." Beirut wasn't attacked daily in the war either way and Dahyeh was mostly Empty during the war The IDF only attacked buildings as a punishment for the people. There has never been that many offices for Hezbullah ever And what damn difference does it make when you don't attacked Beirut but attacked the largest city in south Lebanon, the Capital of the Nabatieh governorate!?
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Mannie's War Room：“距离以色列国防军对贝鲁特南郊发出新的撤离警告已经过去24小时，但尚未进行任何打击。据报道，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普要求总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡缩减对黎巴嫩的打击，以防止与伊朗脆弱的停火协议崩溃。” 无论如何，战争期间贝鲁特并没有每天受到攻击，而且在战争期间达希耶（Dahyeh）大部分是空的。以色列国防军攻击建筑物只是为了惩罚人民。真主党从来没有那么多办公室。当你没有攻击贝鲁特，而是攻击了黎巴嫩南部最大的城市、纳巴泰省的首府时，这有什么该死的区别！？

text: Iran's Press TV, citing Iranian source: Under sustained Iranian pressure, the Zionist regime was forced to halt its attacks on Beirut. Iran made the cessation of attacks a precondition for participating in talks on a temporary ceasefire. Further negotiations are conditional on Israel not attacking Beirut and the Dahiyeh district. Any renewed assault would cause the talks to be completely suspended. The United States compelled the regime to stop its attacks on Beirut. The Iranian delegation’s trip to Islamabad was postponed several times. Continued Israeli strikes could nullify the negotiations altogether.
text_zh: 伊朗新闻电视台援引伊朗消息人士的话称：在伊朗持续的压力下，犹太复国主义政权被迫停止了对贝鲁特的袭击。伊朗将停止袭击作为参与临时停火谈判的前提条件。进一步的谈判以以色列不攻击贝鲁特和达希耶区为条件。任何新的攻击都会导致谈判完全中断。美国强迫该政权停止了对贝鲁特的袭击。伊朗代表团的伊斯兰堡之行被推迟了几次。持续的以色列空袭可能会使谈判完全作废。

text_zh: WarMonitor 前国务卿约翰·克里表示，内塔尼亚胡曾推动打击伊朗，但被奥巴马、拜登和布什拒绝，并补充说特朗普是唯一同意的总统。https://x.com/clashreport/status/2042480457250488393/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel PM Netanyahu: I have instructed to expel the Spanish representatives from the coordination center in Kiryat Gat, after Spain repeatedly chose to stand against Israel. Those who attack the State of Israel instead of the terrorist regimes, those who do so, will not be our partners regarding the future of the region. I am not willing to tolerate this hypocrisy and this hostility. I do not intend to allow any country to wage a political war against us without paying an immediate price." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 总理内塔尼亚胡：在西班牙多次选择站在以色列对立面后，我已指示将西班牙代表从基里亚特加特（Kiryat Gat）的协调中心驱逐出去。那些攻击以色列国而不是恐怖政权的人，那些这样做的人，将不会成为我们未来地区事务的伙伴。我不愿容忍这种虚伪和敌意。我不打算允许任何国家在不付出直接代价的情况下对我们发动政治战争。” 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Ukrainian strike with an FPV drone targets a rare Russian K-4386 Typhoon-VDV MRAP vehicle equipped with a 30mm auto-cannon. The vehicle entered service within the Russian Armed Forces only in 2021. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2042600558607905253/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Five divisions are operating simultaneously across southern Lebanon. Since the launch of Operation “Roar of the Lion,” the IDF says over 1,400 Hezbollah operatives have been killed, 4,300 terror infrastructure sites destroyed, and hundreds of weapons seized. Military operations continue across the south with multiple divisions deployed in parallel. tweet

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah has released footage claiming it targeted Israel’s Glilot base, home to Military Intelligence Unit 8200 north of Tel Aviv, using Nasr-1/2 surface-to-surface missiles. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042597705046766054/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 真主党发布了视频，声称使用Nasr-1/2地对地导弹瞄准了以色列的格利洛特（Glilot）基地，该基地是特拉维夫北部军事情报局8200部队的所在地。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042597705046766054/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to Middle East Spectator — MES: "— 🇮🇱/🇱🇧/🇮🇷 What I’m hearing (could be false, could be true):A ‘compromise’ has been reached where Israel has committed not to strike Beirut while negotiations are ongoing, and ‘scaling back’ attacks in other areas of Lebanon. And when the final ceasefire is in place, a permanent one, then Israel will cease all attacks." The core policy of the Lebanese state is not to give a F about the south and to consider only Beirut is part of Lebanon South Lebanon is the only thing that matter. The Shia of south Lebanon are the Shia of Beirut South Lebanon is Jabal A'mel and whoever abandons south Lebanon abandons Islam. The attacks in Beirut before didn't have any effect on the war. They attacked residential buildings with no impact on the war (excluding the day they killed so many civilians) The war has to stop everywhere. A ceasefire covers all or none. In the past 15 months we lived safely in Beirut while our friends and family lived in daily fear in the south and were killed daily
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Middle East Spectator — MES：“— 🇮🇱/🇱🇧/🇮🇷 我听到的（可能是假的，也可能是真的）：已经达成了一项‘妥协’，以色列承诺在谈判进行期间不打击贝鲁特，并‘缩减’在黎巴嫩其他地区的攻击。当最终停火协议到位，即永久停火协议时，以色列将停止所有攻击。” 黎巴嫩国家的核心政策是不关心南部，只认为贝鲁特是黎巴嫩的一部分。黎巴嫩南部是唯一重要的事情。黎巴嫩南部的什叶派是贝鲁特的什叶派。黎巴嫩南部是贾巴尔·阿梅尔（Jabal A'mel），任何抛弃黎巴嫩南部的人就是抛弃了伊斯兰教。之前对贝鲁特的攻击对战争没有任何影响。他们攻击了住宅楼，对战争没有影响（除了他们杀害那么多平民的那一天）。战争必须在各地停止。停火协议要么涵盖所有地方，要么什么都不涵盖。在过去的15个月里，我们安全地生活在贝鲁特，而我们的朋友和家人在南部每天生活在恐惧中，每天都在被杀害

text: Trump administration plans to ask Iran to release detained Americans during upcoming peace talks in Islamabad, Pakistan. At least six U.S. citizens are believed to be held, possibly as leverage. Source: WaPo
text_zh: 特朗普政府计划在即将于巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡举行的和平谈判中要求伊朗释放被拘留的美国人。据信至少有六名美国公民被扣押，可能被用作筹码。来源：《华盛顿邮报》

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Once again, the alarm sirens are sounding.

text: 😵 🇺🇦 Ukraine is dying out faster than any other country in the world: the population has decreased by 32.5% over the past 25 years, according to Visual Capitalist, based on IMF data. This is the worst indicator among the 183 countries analyzed. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 😵 🇺🇦 乌克兰的消亡速度比世界上任何其他国家都快：根据Visual Capitalist基于国际货币基金组织（IMF）的数据，过去25年人口减少了32.5%。这是所分析的183个国家中最糟糕的指标。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: WORLD’S MOST POWERFUL RESET!!!
text_zh: 特朗普：世界最强力的重置！！！

text: 🇷🇺 ☢️ 🇪🇺 The Economist has published an article about the necessity by the West to maintain scientific relations with Russia despite the geopolitical tension. "Europe's joint nuclear-fusion project needs Russian expertise," 🔸 The article highlights the ongoing, complex collaboration between Western and Russian scientists on the ITER (International Thermonuclear Experimental Reactor) project. 🔸 Continued Collaboration Amid Conflict: Despite the geopolitical tensions following Russia's invasion of Ukraine, the article notes that Russian and Western scientists continue to work together at ITER, though the pace has slowed. 🔸 Russia is a founding member of ITER and provides essential components that are difficult to replace, including poloidal field coils (giant magnets) and busbars for the reactor's electrical current. 🔸 While many scientific ties with Russia have been severed, ITER's unique international legal framework makes it nearly impossible to expel a member. However, sanctions have significantly slowed progress due to increased paperwork and logistical challenges in shipping components. 🔸 The project, originally a Cold War-era "science diplomacy" initiative by Reagan and Gorbachev, now stands as one of the last remaining high-level scientific links between Russia and the West. What ever happened to Russia being a Pariah? The world needs Russia 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 ☢️ 🇪🇺 《经济学人》发表了一篇文章，讨论了尽管地缘政治紧张，西方仍有必要与俄罗斯保持科学关系。“欧洲的联合核聚变项目需要俄罗斯的专业知识，” 🔸 文章强调了西方和俄罗斯科学家在ITER（国际热核聚变实验堆）项目上正在进行的复杂合作。🔸 冲突中的持续合作：尽管俄罗斯入侵乌克兰后地缘政治紧张，但文章指出，俄罗斯和西方科学家继续在ITER共同工作，尽管速度有所放缓。🔸 俄罗斯是ITER的创始成员，并提供难以替代的关键部件，包括极向场线圈（巨型磁铁）和反应堆电流母线。🔸 虽然许多与俄罗斯的科学联系已被切断，但ITER独特的国际法律框架使其几乎不可能驱逐成员。然而，由于文书工作增加和运输部件的物流挑战，制裁已显著减缓了进展。🔸 该项目最初是里根和戈尔巴乔夫冷战时期的“科学外交”倡议，现在是俄罗斯与西方之间仅存的高层科学联系之一。俄罗斯被视为贱民到底是怎么回事？世界需要俄罗斯 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
